nasb.text: For He says to Moses, “I will have mercy on whom I have mercy, and I will have compassion on whom I have compassion.”

esv.text: For he says to Moses, “I will have mercy on whom I have mercy, and I will have compassion on whom I have compassion.”

cnv.text: 因為他對摩西說： “我要憐憫誰，就憐憫誰； 我要恩待誰，就恩待誰。”

ccb.text: 祂曾对摩西说： “我要怜悯谁就怜悯谁， 要恩待谁就恩待谁。”

csbs.text: 因为神对摩西说： “我要怜悯谁，就怜悯谁； 我要同情谁，就同情谁。”
